1.name: Grand Azure Resort & Spa
1.description: Experience unparalleled luxury at the Grand Azure Resort & Spa, located in the pristine waters of the Maldives. Our overwater villas offer direct ocean access, private infinity pools, and breathtaking sunset views. Indulge in world-class dining at our underwater restaurant or rejuvenate your senses at our award-winning holistic spa. Whether you're seeking a romantic getaway or a serene retreat, Grand Azure promises an unforgettable escape.

reviews.text: Absolutely incredible experience! The overwater villa was a dream come true. The staff was incredibly attentive, and the food was out of this world. We will definitely be back for our anniversary!
Beautiful property and excellent service. The spa treatments were top-notch. The only minor issue was the WiFi being a bit spotty in our villa, but everything else was perfect.
A slice of paradise! The snorkeling right off our deck was amazing. The underwater restaurant is a must-try experience. Highly recommend this resort.
